CVE-2021-44269.title: An out of bounds read was found in Wavpack 5.4.0 in processing *. ...
CVE-2021-44269.description: An out of bounds read was found in Wavpack 5.4.0 in processing *.WAV files. This issue triggered in function WavpackPackSamples of file src/pack_utils.c, tainted variable cnt is too large, that makes pointer sptr read beyond heap bound.
